articles.title: DuckDuckGo sees more users over Google AI search
articles.summary: Google is adding AI to search. Many users dislike this change. They are choosing DuckDuckGo instead.
articles.impact: People are choosing search engines that respect their privacy and choices.

articles.title: Windows 11 update makes PCs faster
articles.summary: A new Windows 11 update is out. It makes your computer run much better. It feels quicker and smoother.
articles.impact: Your Windows 11 PC will feel faster after installing this update.

articles.title: Apple Wallet ID for age checks
articles.summary: Apple Wallet can now check your age. This feature works in new places. It proves you are old enough.
articles.impact: Your iPhone's Wallet app can verify your age for certain services now.

articles.title: New Resident Evil demo on Switch 2
articles.summary: A demo for Resident Evil is out. You can play it on the Switch 2. Try the game's start.
articles.impact: Gamers can try the upcoming Resident Evil game on their new Switch.

articles.title: PlayStation game servers shut down
articles.summary: PlayStation closed a game. Destruction AllStars servers are off now. The game is no longer sold.
articles.impact: A PlayStation game is no longer playable online or available for purchase.

articles.title: iPhone 18 Pro might get thicker
articles.summary: The iPhone 18 Pro could be thicker. This follows a trend from last year. Some users accept this.
articles.impact: Future iPhones might be thicker, reversing the trend of making them thinner.

articles.title: PC makers react to Apple laptops
articles.summary: PC makers watch Apple's new laptops. They see Apple's design choices. They are making their own better laptops.
articles.impact: PC makers are trying to match Apple's new laptop designs with their own.

articles.title: June events for Pokémon GO
articles.summary: Pokémon GO has events in June. Catch special Pokémon like Kartana. There are more raids and battles.
articles.impact: Pokémon GO players have new events and Pokémon to catch this June.
